events.title: THIRD DAY 30th Anniversary Tour with very special guest Zach Williams
events.description: Doors 5:30pm. Show 7:00pm. Experience the iconic band that shaped Christian music - Third Day - as they reunite for their 30th Anniversary Tour. For the first time in over a decade, original members Mac Powell, Mark Lee, David Carr, and Tai Anderson will hit the stage together for a limited number of live shows across the U.S. Celebrating three decades of unforgettable hits, this once-in-a-lifetime tour will feature the band?s classic songs, pulling from their legendary catalog of chart-topping singles. Special guest Zach Williams will join the tour, adding his soulful hits to the night. Lineup subject to change. By attending this event, you agree to all uses of photo/video content collected. Awakening Events / Awakening Foundation shows are required to follow local health and venue requirements. Changes in local health guidelines or venue policies are not grounds for a refund.

events.title: KB - The Signal Tour
events.description: This event has been moved to The Underground All Ages Welcome VIP Doors - 5:15PM Early Entry - 6:00PM General Admission - 6:15PM Show - 7:00PM Ticket prices will increase the day of the show. All dates, acts, and ticket prices subject to change without notice. All tickets are subject to applicable service fees via all points of purchase. The Signal Tour is a high-energy, message-driven live experience that goes beyond a concert. Known for his bold faith, sharp lyricism, and electrifying stage presence, KB brings fan favorites and new music together in a powerful night of hip-hop, worship, and purpose. The Signal Tour is a call to tune out the noise, lean into truth, and be part of a movement rooted in hope, authenticity, and community.

events.title: Robert Cray Band
events.description: ACCESSIBILITY - Accessible seating is available online through Ticketmaster by filtering on the ADA Icon and selecting Accessible Seats. Note: the Carolina Theatre has the original, historic stairs in the balcony. Please take that into consideration when buying balcony tickets. CASHLESS VENUE - the Carolina Theatre services all credit and debit payments only. No cash is accepted at the box office or bar. BAG POLICY - We encourage you to pack light with only the necessities to make the entry process as soon as possible. Bags are allowed and are subject to search upon entry. Exceptions will be made for necessary medical equipment or accommodations.

events.title: ChRocktikal the 1st World Tour [CRTK: The Beginning] in Charlotte
events.description: Anyone under the age of 13 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian to be allowed into the facility at any time.ChRocktikal the 1st World Tour [CRTK: The Beginning] marks the arrival of Korean rock band ChRocktikal to North America for the first time ever. The band is ready to meet and perform for their fans as they hit the road on their debut North American run in support of their first full-length album We break, you awake.Formed under Dreamcatcher Company and LEEGEUM ENT., ChRocktikal is a dynamic co-ed group fronted by powerhouse vocalist Lee Siyeon, known for her work with Dreamcatcher, and have quickly established their own identity with a bold, high energy sound and commanding live presence. The wait is finally over, ChRocktikal are bringing the energy to North America, and you wont want to miss it.Tickets for ChRocktikal will go on sale Tuesday Feb 24 at 10AM (CST).General Admission: $50- This is a first come first serve ticket to see ChRocktikal on their first time on tour!VIP: $125 - This ticket includes:- Your ChRocktikal concert ticket - Skip The Line - Sound Check Party - Group Photo - Send-Off after the show *LIMITED!* Please arrive by 4pm!! VVIP: $150 - This ticket includes:- Your ChRocktikal concert ticket - Skip The Line - Sound Check Party - Group Photo - Send-Off after the show - ChRocktikal Fan Sign*LIMITED!* Please arrive by 4pm!! Everything Ticket: $250 - This ticket includes:- Your ChRocktikal concert ticket - Skip The Line - Sound Check Party - Group Photo - Send-Off after the show - ChRocktikal Fan Sign- Exclusive Photocard- You+*LIMITED!* Please arrive by 4pm!! ADD ON: You+: $99 This is a solo photo of You + ChRocktikal, taken on your mobile phone by our staff! LIMITED! (This does not include a concert ticket.)Tickets are limited and available while supplies last.

events.title: Bach & Beyond with Charlotte Symphony Orchestra
events.description: J.S. Bachs exhilarating Brandenburg Concertos frame an evening that bridges the Baroque spirit across centuries, paired with Handels glittering Water Music and contemporary reflections on the form by Caroline Shaw and Nancy Galbriath. Held in the historic Carolina Theatre, this concert brings the vitality and clarity of Baroque music into the present.
